description_long: This object consists of two pairs of low-top shoes, one pair in black and the other in white, both featuring a minimalist, modern design. The shoes have a smooth, unadorned upper with subtle stitching and a rounded toe box, giving them a sleek and versatile appearance. The soles are slightly textured for grip, and the interior lining appears to be a light tan or beige color, suggesting comfort and breathability. There are no visible logos or branding elements on the exterior, emphasizing a clean aesthetic. The shoes are slip-on style, lacking any visible laces or fastening mechanisms. The overall build suggests they are made primarily of synthetic leather or coated fabric with rubber soles, suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A set of two pairs of minimalist slip-on shoes, one black and one white, with smooth uppers and textured soles. The design is clean and modern, with no visible logos or laces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe boxes and the color contrast between the black and white pairs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the smooth, seamless uppers and the subtle sole texture of both color variants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel shape, the light tan interior lining, and the back seam details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the clean lines and the difference in color between the two pairs.
